name: MCPWP
author: Mumega
changelog:
2.8.37

  • Fix: PHP fatal in wp_seo_audit_site and wp_validate_seo_readiness — extract_internal_links_from_content() moved to base class.
  • Fix: Disabled tool categories now enforced at execution time, not just discovery.
  • Fix: Elementor custom-code tools hidden from tools/list when Elementor Pro is not installed.

2.8.36

  • Fix: wp_bulk_find_replace operates on decoded element tree to prevent JSON corruption.
  • Fix: wp_setup_menu with overwrite=true clears existing items before repopulating.
  • New: wp_get_kit_css and wp_set_kit_css for Elementor kit global CSS.

2.8.35

  • Fix: Admin role auto-grants full scopes — no manual checkbox needed.
  • UX: Scopes section hidden for preset roles.
